column1: Note to RAs. This spreadsheet contains a bunch of track information for possible tracks that could be useful. It was Sam and Manvir's first round of promising searches using the Harvard Archive of World Music. You can find a record of each item via the Harvard Library at http://hollis.harvard.edu, doing an advanced search by Hollis #, and pasting the number in Column E.
